Generally recommended to pull for Blade of the Titan (Goliath's Sig SSR WoD) and raise it to E3+12 / obtain 16 total Copies
So that you can use it together with another SSR WoD
It's best used on DPS, who like Crit Rate
Crit Damage after Exalt is also hella helpful
Along with the chance to reduce the Cost of the Wielder's Cards
